title: One Piece 5e Pirate Log Sheet
description: A custom Foundry VTT v13 character sheet wrapping the One Piece 5e 'Pirate Log' HTML sheet. Registers a sheet you can apply to any Actor of type 'character' from the system you have active. Persists all sheet data, including portraits, to actor flags so it works in a shared (hosted) Foundry game.
